title: derris montana
intro: Derris montana, also known as Andira inermis, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Fabaceae. Its roots contain rotenone, a natural insecticide, which has been used for centuries in traditional medicine to treat various ailments. The medicinal properties of Derris montana include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties, which contribute to its health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. Derris montana can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and its bark and roots are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
